# Styling Instructions

Use when changing CSS Modules, design tokens, layout, accessibility states, or visual presentation.

## Rules

- Use CSS Modules for component styles.
- Use camelCase CSS class names.
- Use existing tokens from `src/styles/tokens.css`.
- Do not hardcode colors, spacing, typography, shadows, or radii if a token exists.
- Do not add new design tokens without approval.
- Preserve `:focus-visible`, hover, disabled, and reduced-motion states where relevant.
- Keep styling changes scoped to the affected component or view.
